summary: Plan-only inventory shard. Four open non-security PRs remain blocked from merge recommendation by missing required merge preflight or unresolved maintainer judgment. Validator repair routes #93100 as security-sensitive to central OpenClaw security handling, scoped to that exact PR only.

actions.reason: Likely low-risk docs candidate, but merge cannot be recommended without required /review and hydrated comment preflight proof.
Compatibility-affecting provider behavior change has passing checks, but missing required review/comment preflight blocks merge recommendation.
Failing Real behavior proof and missing required review/comment preflight block merge; failure detail is not hydrated enough to produce a concrete repair artifact.
Third-party commercial hardware documentation placement is a product/docs policy decision; merge is also blocked by missing required review/comment preflight.
Security-sensitive PR is out of ProjectClownfish backlog-cleanup scope and must be routed to central OpenClaw security handling without mutating GitHub.
